name: Campus Network (CVSS-weighted)
description: Same topology as the paper's campus network, but every edge weight is DERIVED from a CVSS v3.1 Exploitability vector instead of being hand-picked. Each transition is modelled as a realistic exploit (remote RCE, phishing, lateral movement, AD compromise, etc.), so the resulting weights are auditable rather than arbitrary. Compare against campus_paper.json to see the rigorous vs. simplified weighting.

edges.cve: remote RCE on public web app
SMB relay onto internal pivot host
SMB relay onto internal pivot host
local privesc to domain admin on AD
local dump of backup DB image
